title: GeyserMoreRows
description: Show more types of inventories to Bedrock Edition players.
body:
# GeyserMoreRows

GeyserMoreRows is a spigot plugin that appends custom text to chest window titles for Floodgate (Bedrock) players, 
allowing alternative chest UI layouts (for example 1x9 or 2x9 rows) to be represented visually via a resource pack.

## Showcase
![Showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/554f334c1759920d0683115d047312a7d93fe1fa_0.webp)
## Requirements
- [PacketEvents](https://github.com/retrooper/packetevents)
- Floodgate
- [A custom resource pack](https://github.com/GeyserExtensionists/GeyserMoreRows/raw/refs/heads/main/MorerowsPack.mcpack) (Required for Bedrock UI changes)

## Resource Pack (Required)
- Download the [resource pack](https://github.com/GeyserExtensionists/GeyserMoreRows/raw/refs/heads/main/MorerowsPack.mcpack)
- Put the resource pack on packs folder of your Geyser
